name: list_feishu_bitable_tables
description: Lists all tables within a Feishu Bitable app.

appToken.description: Bitable app token (required). Found in the URL of a Feishu Bitable: `https://xxx.feishu.cn/base/{appToken}`.

pageToken.description: Pagination token (optional). Use the page_token from the previous response to fetch the next page.

pageSize.description: Number of items per page (optional). Max 500, default 100.
